---
title: ""
format: html
editor: visual
navbar: false
---

## Week 11 - Wednesday, April 22nd

### Class Objectives

1.  30 MIN : Look over a research article.
2.  20 MIN : Look at some Dig Deeper assignments.
3.  40 MIN : Get started on the final project (!!!)

### Class Slides

```{=html}

<iframe data-external="1" class="slide-deck" src="/rm/slides/11_M1Research.html" width=100% height="400px"></iframe>
```

### Useful Links

-   [**CHECK-IN : refugee study**](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfXDma6OLDL3LZgEs_3z_pyHepAz7SsAVv3eU7gIRxTViZ5Ug/viewform?usp=header)
-   [Dig Deeper](/rm/notes/digdeeper.qmd)
-   [Final Project Description & Rubric](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1QJKm9s8WUXAoYACf_pC9QIWdYyfEOHQNMnP4unkXGYI/edit?usp=sharing)
-   [Vision Board](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/14u3w5edvo6KSFRw2U9t1knDANFSGBWOvDjS7-ZGujos/edit?usp=sharing)

## Before Next Class : Milestone #1

**Research a Topic and Find a "Seed" Article**

-   do a lit review on google scholar...learn from a quick scan of the titles and abstracts.

-   find and summarize at least five articles to add to your [annotated bibliography](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1w_c0ME7PDWmNIoxU5S4mla7uvB9lZyvMt4uIXccrqrE/edit?usp=sharing) (you do not need to read everything!)

-   find ONE SPECIFIC STUDY that seems most relevant to your topic
